title: Anti Night Vision
description: This mod completely disables the Night Vision effect, very useful for people who hate Night Vision like myself!
body:
# Anti Night Vision
## What does the mod do?
This mod does one thing and one thing only, you may have guessed from the name of the mod, but it removes the Night Vision Potion Effect.

## Why make such a one-off mod?
I made this mod out of spite honestly. This mod is good for those who play on servers with Custom Items that give good effects, but might have the disgusting Night Vision effect which tends to ruin shaders.

## Contact
My username on Discord is AlexTheNerd, I usually respond within 12 hours!
